name: ultraplan-command-framework
description: Portable Claude Code slash-command framework: plan, execute, delegate, and review with sub-agents.

commands.name: ultraplan
commands.summary: Deploy parallel sub-agents to research and produce a rigorous step-by-step ultra plan.

commands.name: goal
commands.summary: Execute an ultra plan in a verify-gated loop until the success criteria are met.

commands.name: agents
commands.summary: Dispatch the current task to background sub-agents and hand control back (zoom out).

commands.name: ultrareview
commands.summary: Deploy parallel sub-agents to review produced code (correctness, security, tests, style).
